description: You are an order fulfillment specialist setting up a WooCommerce store for US sales and processing the first order. Enable tax rates and calculations in the store settings. Configure a standard tax rate for California (CA), United States, at 8.25% named 'CA Sales Tax' with priority 1 for all zip codes and cities. Create a shipping zone named 'California' covering the state of California with a 'Flat rate' shipping method costing $7.99. Create a manual order for customer Jane Smith (jane.smith@example.com) with the billing state set to 'CA'. The order must include two Organic Cotton T-Shirts and one Bamboo Cutting Board Set. Add a private order note 'Priority fulfillment - customer loyalty reward' and set the order status to 'Processing'.
